calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-02-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as regularly scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Herbert Donaldson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair
Petitioner, Lilis Tangkal present in pro per with Mandarin Interpreter, William Guan. Plaintiff was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Lily Tan.
Decree signed in open court.
